is the national under-21 [football](/wiki/Football_(soccer) "Football (soccer)") team of [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium") and is controlled by the [Belgian Football Association](/wiki/Belgian_Football_Association "Belgian Football Association"). The team competes in the [UEFA European Under-21 Championship](/wiki/UEFA_European_Under-21_Championship "UEFA European Under-21 Championship"), held every two years. Their biggest successes were winning the [2007–09](/wiki/2007%E2%80%9309_International_Challenge_Trophy "2007–09 International Challenge Trophy") [International Challenge Trophy](/wiki/International_Challenge_Trophy "International Challenge Trophy") and reaching the European Championship semi-finals in [2007 in the Netherlands](/wiki/2007_UEFA_European_Under-21_Football_Championship "2007 UEFA European Under-21 Football Championship"). Thanks to the latter achievement, Belgium qualified for the football tournament at the [2008 Summer Olympics](/wiki/2008_Summer_Olympics "2008 Summer Olympics"). Their current home stadium is [Den Dreef](/wiki/Den_Dreef "Den Dreef") in [Leuven](/wiki/Leuven "Leuven").

The **Belgium national under-21 football team** is the national under-21 [football](/wiki/Football_(soccer) "Football (soccer)") team of [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium") and is controlled by the [Belgian Football Association](/wiki/Belgian_Football_Association "Belgian Football Association"). The team competes in the [UEFA European Under-21 Championship](/wiki/UEFA_European_Under-21_Championship "UEFA European Under-21 Championship"), held every two years. Their biggest successes were winning the [2007–09](/wiki/2007%E2%80%9309_International_Challenge_Trophy "2007–09 International Challenge Trophy") [International Challenge Trophy](/wiki/International_Challenge_Trophy "International Challenge Trophy") and reaching the European Championship semi-finals in [2007 in the Netherlands](/wiki/2007_UEFA_European_Under-21_Football_Championship "2007 UEFA European Under-21 Football Championship"). Thanks to the latter achievement, Belgium qualified for the football tournament at the [2008 Summer Olympics](/wiki/2008_Summer_Olympics "2008 Summer Olympics"). Their current home stadium is [Den Dreef](/wiki/Den_Dreef "Den Dreef") in [Leuven](/wiki/Leuven "Leuven").
